_meta.purpose: Drives the simulator AI's behavior per WotC Commander bracket. Triangulated from the WotC bracket beta announcement, the Command Zone 300-game survey (avg 10.29 turns at B2-3), and cEDH community statistics (avg winning turn 2-4). Numbers are estimates — adjust as you observe sim behavior.
policy: winMix is a relative-weight bias for hand-priority. Higher combo weight = AI tutors and casts wincons earlier. Higher combat weight = AI develops board and attacks.
reactToWinconProb / reactToThreatProb gate `pickInteraction`. cEDH counter-wars are ~95% reactive on key spells.
mulliganStrictness > 1 adds extra rejection rules; < 1 loosens them.
expectedEndTurn is the bracket's typical game length; affects AI's 'is it time to push?' decisions.
maxTurns is the engine's hard cap for a game at this bracket — sims past this declare a stalemate.
